# SDD Artifact Model

Prose status: draft

## Requirements

- FR-001: Define stable lifecycle identifiers.
- FR-002: Define project-level SDD artifact contracts.
- FR-003: Define work-item artifact contracts.
- FR-004: Define generated-view stale diagnostics.

## Decisions

- DEC-001: Structured graph data wins executable lifecycle decisions.
